cards.front: ![[stp-convergence.svg]]
cards.back: STP convergence on a newly-up port: Blocking → Listening (max-age 20s) → Learning (fwd-delay 15s) → Forwarding (fwd-delay 15s). **Total ~50s before traffic flows.** PortFast skips all three transitional states for access ports.

cards.front:
![[stp-convergence.svg]]
STP state where the switch is [...] but not yet forwarding data is **Learning**.

cards.front: Conflict resolution order in sims
cards.back: Task > topology > config. Task wins if it disagrees with topology.

cards.front: Task > topology > config. Task wins if it disagrees with topology.
What 6 things to scan on sim topology, in order?
cards.back:
1. Device names/roles
2. Interface labels per link
3. Subnets/IPs printed on links
4. VLAN numbers on switch ports
5. Cloud/WAN clouds (default route hint)
6. Color coding (OSPF area, VLAN, trunk)

cards.front: Which column of `show ip int br` to read first?
cards.back: Protocol (rightmost) — then Status, then IP, then Interface name

cards.front: Status `administratively down` means?
`no shutdown` missing on the interface

cards.back: L1 + L2 fine — problem is L3 or higher

cards.front: Order to configure tasks in a sim
cards.back: 1. All interfaces first (no shut, IP, description). 2. Routing/VLAN/ACL second. 3. Verify in one pass at end.

cards.front: 1. All interfaces first (no shut, IP, description). 2. Routing/VLAN/ACL second. 3. Verify in one pass at end.

cards.front: 5-item final checklist before submitting sim
cards.back:
1. `do wr` on every device touched
2. Ping end-to-end works
3. Re-read each task — all sub-bullets done
4. No interface left `shutdown`
5. No half-typed command in buffer
